title: To Flowers.
content:
In time of life I graced ye with my verse;
    Do now your flowery honours to my hearse.
    You shall not languish, trust me; virgins here
    Weeping shall make ye flourish all the year.
meaning:
"To Flowers." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
